movie.actors: Tom Selleck, Steve Guttenberg, Ted Danson, Nancy Travis
movie.plot: Three bachelors find themselves forced to take care of a baby left by one of the guys' girlfriends.
movie.title: 3 Men and a Baby
movie.writer: Coline Serreau (screenplay "Trois Hommes et un Couffin"), James Orr (screenplay), Jim Cruickshank (screenplay)
